detail.visible_answer:
{
  "analysis": "Found two PDB entries (7BG1, 8RMO) containing the antibody. I need to look these up to identify the target protein.",
  "plan": "Query PDB for entries 7BG1 and 8RMO to identify the antibody target, and also look at the antibody FASTA to see what antigen it binds.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
import urllib.request
import json

# Look up both PDB entries
for pdb_id in ['7BG1', '8RMO']:
    try:
        url = f'https://data.rcsb.org/rest/v1/core/entry/{pdb_id}'
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15)
        d = json.loads(resp.read())
        title = d.get('struct', {}).get('title', 'N/A')
        print(f"{pdb_id}: {title}")
        
        # Get entity info
        entities = d.get('rcsb_entry_container_identifiers', {}).get('polymer_entity_ids', [])
        print(f"  Polymer entities: {entities}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"{pdb_id}: ERROR {e}")

print("\n--- Looking up entity details for 7BG1 ---")
for eid in ['1', '2', '3', '4']:
    try:
        url = f'https://data.rcsb.org/rest/v1/core/polymer_entity/7BG1/{eid}'
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15)
        d = json.loads(resp.read())
        desc = d.get('rcsb_polymer_entity', {}).get('pdbx_description', 'N/A')
        print(f"  7BG1/{eid}: {desc}")
    except Exception as e:
        pass

print("\n--- Looking up entity details for 8RMO ---")
for eid in ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5']:
    try:
        url = f'https://data.rcsb.org/rest/v1/core/polymer_entity/8RMO/{eid}'
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15)
        d = json.loads(resp.read())
        desc = d.get('rcsb_polymer_entity', {}).get('pdbx_description', 'N/A')
        print(f"  8RMO/{eid}: {desc}")
    except Exception as e:
        pass
